rubric.description: README/setup, audit/improvement/discovery/cost docs, and evidence that the team oriented around Ship.
rubric.name: Required deliverables and orientation

rubric.description: Coverage of the seven required ShipShape categories plus the security audit extension.
rubric.name: Audit coverage across categories

rubric.description: Concrete baseline/after language, benchmarks, measurements, and reproducibility signals.
rubric.name: Before/after improvement evidence

rubric.description: Runnable security probe or audit tooling covering auth/session, WebSocket validation, input sanitization, dependency audit, and manual review concerns.
rubric.name: Security probe deliverable

rubric.description: Presence of meaningful tests and scripts connected to the improvement work.
rubric.name: Testing and regression protection

rubric.description: Basic project health: package metadata, workspace/config files, source tree, and recent commit availability.
rubric.name: Repo health and runnable shape

rubric.description: Interesting choices, standout polish, or transferable ideas visible from static review.
rubric.name: Cohort learning signal
